changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql:
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_STUDY_SESSIONS START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE;
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_PROGRESS START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE
changeSet.rollback: DROP SEQUENCE SEQ_STUDY_SESSIONS; DROP SEQUENCE SEQ_PROGRESS

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE STUDY_SESSIONS ( ID NUMBER NOT NULL, USER_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, SESSION_TYPE VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL, STARTED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, ENDED_AT TIMESTAMP, DURATION_MINUTES NUMBER DEFAULT 0, WORDS_REVIEWED NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, EXERCISES_COMPLETED NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, CORRECT_ANSWERS NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, INCORRECT_ANSWERS NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, ACTIVE NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_STUDY_SESSIONS PRIMARY KEY (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_SESSION_USER FOREIGN KEY (USER_ID) REFERENCES USERS (ID), CONSTRAINT CK_SESSION_TYPE CHECK (SESSION_TYPE IN ('REVIEW','EXERCISE','CONVERSATION','READING','MIXED')), CONSTRAINT CK_SESSION_DURATION CHECK (DURATION_MINUTES >= 0 OR DURATION_MINUTES IS NULL), CONSTRAINT CK_SESSION_WORDS CHECK (WORDS_REVIEWED >= 0), CONSTRAINT CK_SESSION_EXERCISES CHECK (EXERCISES_COMPLETED >= 0), CONSTRAINT CK_SESSION_CORRECT CHECK (CORRECT_ANSWERS >= 0), CONSTRAINT CK_SESSION_INCORRECT CHECK (INCORRECT_ANSWERS >= 0), CONSTRAINT CK_SESSION_ACTIVE CHECK (ACTIVE IN (0, 1)) )

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE PROGRESS ( ID NUMBER NOT NULL, USER_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, VOCABULARY_WORD_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, MASTERY_LEVEL NUMBER(3) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, TOTAL_REVIEWS NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, CORRECT_REVIEWS NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, LAST_ACTIVITY_DATE DATE DEFAULT SYSDATE, CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, ACTIVE NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_PROGRESS PRIMARY KEY (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_PROGRESS_USER FOREIGN KEY (USER_ID) REFERENCES USERS (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_PROGRESS_VOCAB FOREIGN KEY (VOCABULARY_WORD_ID) REFERENCES VOCABULARY_WORDS (ID), CONSTRAINT UQ_PROGRESS_USER_VOCAB UNIQUE (USER_ID, VOCABULARY_WORD_ID), CONSTRAINT CK_PROGRESS_MASTERY CHECK (MASTERY_LEVEL BETWEEN 0 AND 100), CONSTRAINT CK_PROGRESS_TOTAL CHECK (TOTAL_REVIEWS >= 0), CONSTRAINT CK_PROGRESS_CORRECT CHECK (CORRECT_REVIEWS >= 0), CONSTRAINT CK_PROGRESS_ACTIVE CHECK (ACTIVE IN (0, 1)) )

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE EXERCISE_ATTEMPTS ADD CONSTRAINT FK_ATTEMPT_SESSION FOREIGN KEY (STUDY_SESSION_ID) REFERENCES STUDY_SESSIONS (ID)
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE EXERCISE_ATTEMPTS DROP CONSTRAINT FK_ATTEMPT_SESSION

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE SENTENCE_PRACTICES ADD CONSTRAINT FK_SENTENCE_SESSION FOREIGN KEY (STUDY_SESSION_ID) REFERENCES STUDY_SESSIONS (ID)
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE SENTENCE_PRACTICES DROP CONSTRAINT FK_SENTENCE_SESSION

changeSet.author: englishmemory
englishmemory
